prestazioni: Engine swap to LEA1 1.5L i-VTEC I4 (from 8th-gen Civic Si) with forged internals (JE 87mm pistons, Eagle H-beam rods, ACL race bearings) and K24 crankshaft for 2.0L stroker displacement, paired with a custom Hybrid Racing K-series adapter plate for CR-Z transaxle compatibility

Full hybrid system overhaul: AEM EV VCU-300 controller managing a Tesla Model 3 rear motor (250 kW peak) integrated via a custom Quaife ATB differential, with a 400V LiFePO4 battery pack (Orion BMS 2) replacing the IMA system for 350+ hp combined output

Forced induction via Garrett GTX3076R Gen II turbo (0.82 A/R, 62mm compressor) on a custom Treadstone manifold, feeding a PRL Motorsports 4-1 merge collector with 3.5" downpipe, mated to a Tial MV-R 44mm wastegate and dual HKS SSQV4 blow-off valves, with a custom Hondata KPro V4 ECU tune for 22 psi peak boost
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny Version 3 widebody kit (CR-Z-specific, 3-piece overfenders, carbon fiber front splitter with canards, and duckbill rear wing) with custom 3M Matte Military Green wrap and exposed carbon fiber weave accents

Custom carbon fiber hybrid battery cover (replacing IMA) with integrated LED charge status display (AEM CD-7 dash integration), paired with a Seibon carbon fiber hood (Type 3, 30% weight reduction) and rear diffuser from a 2015+ Civic Type R (FK2) adapted via custom mounting brackets

OMP HTE-R carbon fiber racing seats (FIA 8862-2009 certified) with custom Bride Euro II recliners, paired with a NRG Innovations quick-release steering wheel (350mm, suede) and a custom bolt-in roll cage (Autopower 8-point, TIG-welded 4130 chromoly) with integrated harness bar for Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses
